summary: Comprehensive testing of CampusCrave iteration 2 completed successfully. All new features implemented and working excellently including payment module, video slider, offers with countdown timers, trending/specials sections, referral system, and enhanced outlet/admin dashboards. Backend APIs 100% functional (32/32 tests passed). Frontend shows 95% success rate with only minor modal overlay issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepting clicks in some scenarios

integration_issues.issue: Copy referral code shows permission denied error

passed_tests: All authentication flows (student, outlet staff, admin)
Student dashboard: Today's Offers section with 4 offers and countdown timers
Student dashboard: Specials For You section with 4 personalized items
Student dashboard: Trending Now section with 2 trending items and rankings
Venue menu modal with combo badges and video play buttons
Item detail modal with YouTube video slider (image/video toggle)
Video functionality: Watch Video button and video playback
Add item to cart functionality with quantity controls
Cart display with items and pricing
Referral system: code display (CCRAHUL1), stats cards, apply functionality
Payment methods display: UPI, Card, Wallet, Credits with proper icons
Outlet staff Kanban board with 4 columns and order management
Outlet View Stats: Revenue Summary, Top Items, Customer Reviews
Admin dashboard: 8 stat cards, bar chart, pie chart, top items, platform summary
All backend APIs (32/32 tests passed)
New features APIs: offers, trending, specials, search, payment, referral
Payment processing for all methods (UPI/Card/Wallet/Credits)
Outlet analytics API with earnings, ratings, commission breakdown
Enhanced admin analytics with user growth and referral stats
Role-based dashboard routing and logout functionality
